data/maps/AbandonedShip_Corridors_B1F/te.AbandonedShip_Corridors_B1F_Text_DuncanI: When we go out to sea, we SAILORS\nalways bring our POKéMON.\lHow about a quick battle?
data/maps/AbandonedShip_Corridors_B1F/te.AbandonedShip_Corridors_B1F_Text_DuncanP: The ship's bottom has sunk into the\ndepths.\pIf a POKéMON knew how to go underwater,\nwe might make some progress...
data/maps/AbandonedShip_Corridors_B1F/te.AbandonedShip_Corridors_B1F_Text_DoorIsL: The door is locked.\p“STORAGE” is painted on the door.
data/maps/AbandonedShip_Corridors_B1F/te.AbandonedShip_Corridors_B1F_Text_Inserte: {PLAYER} inserted and turned the\nSTORAGE KEY.\pThe inserted KEY stuck fast, but the\ndoor opened.
